headline: Is Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Fairly Priced After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Gain?
summary: Wondering if Ulta Beauty at around US$531.95 is offering fair value or if you would be overpaying for growth right now? This article walks through what the current price might really mean for you. The stock has delivered a 34.9% return over the last year, while the year to date move is a 14.2% decline, with 7 day and 30 day returns of 1.4% and 1.0% declines respectively. These moves may catch your eye if you track momentum or shifts in sentiment. Recent coverage around Ulta Beauty has...

headline: DoorDash delivers memes, reality TV moms for Mother’s Day campaign
summary: A hero spot and social content spotlight the mom group chat as part of an effort that includes deals with Ulta, Old Navy and more.
